signals.reasoning: Cover the live SOL short. Even though the loss has narrowed from the prior check, the position still retained none of peak P&L, remains flagged urgent, has no stop, and liquidation distance is still only about 0.99%. That keeps this in cleanup territory rather than thesis-hold territory.
BTC is still holding the upper part of its recovery range and is not confirming a strong downside continuation. No reason to press correlated shorts while SOL remains weakly structured.
ETH remains firm and the current CAUTION event is narrow rather than market-wide. Position management still means fixing the SOL short first.
TST is still a very crowded squeeze name with unstable execution quality. It stays watch-only.
FARTCOIN remains trend-supported and crowded on the long side. Chasing is late and fading is still risky, so no action.
CHILLGUY has some squeeze support underneath, but the chart is still messy and not cleaner than addressing the live SOL risk.
RESOLV still shows the best bearish micro-structure on this sheet with fresh shorts pressing, but liquidity and execution quality are weak enough that it remains watch-only.
ALGO is still constructive and not giving a clean reversal signal. No action.
SYRUP is weak on the day but already flagged as low-quality by the mechanical board, and it is too thin to prioritize during position management.
KNEIRO remains too thin and underdefined in the live snapshot to support a confident management call.
BOME is still noisy and extended enough that neither side offers clean execution from here. Watch-only.
